name: Ice Age

draft.notes: Pack order: 3 uncommons, 1 rare, 11 commons. Basic lands (incl. snow-covered) do not appear in booster packs.

sourceNotes: Large set printed in Belgium with striped collation. 36 packs per box. Set has three variations of each standard basic land plus five snow-covered basics, but lands are not in boosters. Pre-1999, no foils.
